targetProject.en: The target project to connect to

sourceComponent.en: The source component to connect from (component name, path relative to source project root, or generator id). Use '.' to explicitly select the project as the source.

targetComponent.en: The target component to connect to (component name, path relative to target project root, or generator id). Use '.' to explicitly select the project as the target.

license.en: SPDX License Identifier for your chosen license

copyrightHolder.en: The copyright holder, included in the LICENSE file and source file headers by default.

openApiSpecPath.en: Path to the OpenAPI specification relative to the monorepo root

outputPath.en: Path to the directory in which to generate the client relative to the monorepo root

openApiSpecPath.en: Path to the OpenAPI specification relative to the monorepo root

outputPath.en: Path to the directory in which to generate the hooks relative to the monorepo root

openApiSpecPath.en: Path to the OpenAPI specification relative to the monorepo root

outputPath.en: Path to the directory in which to generate the metadata relative to the monorepo root

addTsPlugin.en: Whether to add the ts plugin.

name.en: Name of the API project to generate

computeType.en: The type of compute to use to deploy this API. Choose between ServerlessApiGatewayRestApi (default) or ServerlessApiGatewayHttpApi.

integrationPattern.en: How API Gateway integrations are generated for the API. Choose between isolated (default) and shared.

auth.en: The method used to authenticate with your API. Choose between IAM (default), Cognito or None.

directory.en: The directory to store the application in.

iacProvider.en: The preferred IaC provider. By default this is inherited from your initial selection.

project.en: The project to add the lambda function to

functionName.en: The name of the function to add

functionPath.en: The path within the project source directory to add the function to

eventSource.en: Optional event source model to use for the lambda function

iacProvider.en: The preferred IaC provider. By default this is inherited from your initial selection.

project.en: The project to add an MCP server to

computeType.en: The type of compute to host your MCP server. Select None for no hosting.

name.en: The name of your MCP server (default: mcp-server)

iacProvider.en: The preferred IaC provider. By default this is inherited from your initial selection.

name.en: The name of the Python project

directory.en: Parent directory where the project is placed.

project.en: The project to add the Strands Agent to

computeType.en: The type of compute to host your Strands Agent.

name.en: The name of your Strands Agent (default: agent)

iacProvider.en: The preferred IaC provider. By default this is inherited from your initial selection.

serviceName.en: The name of your Smithy service. Uses the supplied name by default.

namespace.en: The namespace for the Smithy API. Defaults to your monorepo scope

directory.en: Parent directory where the Smithy project is placed.

subDirectory.en: The sub directory the Smithy project is placed in. By default this is the project name.

type.en: Whether this is a terraform lib (re-usable modules) or app (deployable).

directory.en: The directory of the new project.
The directory of the new application.

enableStageConfig.en: Enable centralized stage configuration (credentials, account, region) for multi-environment CDK deployments.
